statement: In every magma, Equation 720 (`x = y * (y * ((y * z) * y))`) implies Equation 3177 (`x = (((y * z) * x) * x) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0040
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op y z) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) x) x) y)
